claim: Claude Skills use the DBS framework: Direction (skill.md workflow), Blueprints (references folder with guides/assets), Solutions (scripts for code/APIs)
actionable: Structure all Claude Skills using DBS: write skill.md with step-by-step workflows, add references folder with brand/voice guides, add scripts folder for Python/API calls.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Skill.md is the only required file and contains metadata (name, description), workflows (step-by-step process), and rules (constraints/guardrails)
actionable: Create a minimal skill with just skill.md containing: metadata, a multi-step workflow that mirrors your actual process, and rules for what not to do.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Skill descriptions should capture when to activate the skill (not the full workflow) to save tokens and keep context lean
actionable: Write concise skill descriptions like 'daily morning rundown' instead of listing all steps; Claude checks description to decide activation before loading full workflow.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: References folder stores static blueprints (brand guides, voice guides, data samples, images) that Claude references every execution
actionable: Add reference files for brand colors, tone of voice, past examples, templates, and domain data that your skill will need every time it runs.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Scripts folder contains Python/code solutions for when Claude can't accomplish a task with natural language alone (API calls, file formatting, external services)
actionable: Create Python scripts for calling external APIs not available in Claude connectors (e.g., image generators, external services) and let Claude execute them during workflow.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Connectors enable Claude to authenticate with and take actions on apps like Gmail, Google Calendar, Notion, Figma, Linear, Gamma, and 100+ others
actionable: Connect your most-used apps through Claude's connector panel so skills can read/write data across your entire tool stack without manual API setup.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Skill Creator skill helps users build automations by asking discovery questions and generating the full DBS structure automatically
actionable: Use Claude's Skill Creator to design new automations: describe what you want to automate and answer its discovery questions instead of building skill.md from scratch.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Skills should be triggered by slash commands or natural language phrases that describe when to use them
actionable: Define skill triggers as slash commands (/today) or natural language patterns ('What do I have today?') so Claude recognizes when to activate the skill.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Structured output (JSON format requirements) enables skill evaluations to test whether skill output matches expected format and quality
actionable: Define required output JSON schemas for skills and run test cases to verify the skill produces output in the exact format you expect every time.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Skills should be tested with multiple test cases before enabling scheduled execution to ensure quality and prevent failures in production
actionable: Create at least 3 diverse test cases and run skill evaluations before scheduling automation; iterate based on eval feedback before deployment.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Skills can be scheduled to run automatically at specific times (daily at 9 AM) without manual triggering when the computer is on
actionable: Set up scheduled tasks in Claude Cowork to run skills on cron schedules so automations execute without you typing anything.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Skills should be organized by business department (marketing, finance, ops, communications) rather than as one-off automations
actionable: Plan your automation strategy by department and create skills for repeated tasks within each department (email campaigns, presentation creation, data analysis).
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Skill format is an open standard that works across Claude, Codex, Gemini, and other AI agents (not vendor-locked to Claude)
actionable: Build skills in the standard format knowing they are portable across multiple AI platforms, so you are not locked into one provider.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Gamma connector allows Claude to programmatically create presentations from data, apply brand styling, and generate interactive visuals
actionable: Use Gamma connector within skills to transform raw data or research into fully branded, visually polished presentations automatically.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!

claim: Workflow feedback loops let you iterate skill references (brand guides, voice guides, slide structure) based on test results before finalizing
actionable: After running skill tests, review outputs and provide specific feedback (e.g., 'remove M-dashes, add neon pink accents') which Claude applies to reference files.
source_title: Full Claude Skills Tutorial for Beginners in 2026!
